Notes: SMSU was led by Andrea Fennern who had a career high 17 points.. Concordia
clinches second regular season NSIC Championship.. SMSU's Sara Leidall
led the Mustangs with 10 rebounds..Concordia was led by Amanda Behnke with
24 points.. Katie LaViolette had a double-double with 17 points, 12 assists
Game.Officials: Darin Berg,  Jay McGivern,  Tom Wollan
